sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id Int32, value Float64, group_key String, degree_of_freedom Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, randStudentT(10), 'A', 10), (2, randStudentT(20), 'B', 20), (3, randStudentT(30), 'A', 30), (4, NULL, 'C', 10);
SELECT id, value, group_key FROM test_data WHERE value IN (SELECT randStudentT(degree_of_freedom) FROM test_data WHERE degree_of_freedom IS NOT NULL);
SELECT group_key, AVG(value) AS avg_value FROM test_data GROUP BY group_key HAVING GLOBAL IN (avg_value, randStudentT(15));
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.group_key FROM test_data AS t1 JOIN test_data AS t2 ON (t1.degree_of_freedom > randStudentT(15) OR t2.degree_of_freedom IS NULL);
SELECT id, randStudentT(15) AS random_dist FROM test_data WHERE randStudentT(degree_of_freedom) GLOBAL IN (value);
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (id Int32, name String, precision_val Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT name, precision_val FROM edge_cases WHERE precision_val GLOBAL IN (SELECT ROUND(randStudentT(10), 1) FROM numbers(5));
SELECT id, value, group_key, value * 2 AS double_value FROM test_data WHERE double_value IN (SELECT randStudentT(degree_of_freedom) FROM test_data);
